name: shici-zhaji
description: 本地离线古诗词学习工具
author: yeebo

scripts.desktop:run: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && electron electron/main-static.cjs
scripts.desktop:run:legacy: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && electron .
scripts.package:win: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.static.json --win nsis --x64
scripts.package:win:portable: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.static.json --win portable --x64
scripts.package:win:zip: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.static.json --win zip --x64
scripts.package:win:dir: npm run build:index:sqlite && npm run build:web:desktop-static && npm run prepare:desktop-static-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.static.json --win dir --x64
scripts.package:win:legacy: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.legacy.json --win portable --x64
scripts.package:win:legacy:nsis: npm run build:web && npm run prepare:desktop-runtime && electron-builder --config electron-builder.legacy.json --win nsis --x64
